login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue

signup.title: Create an account
signup.subtitle: Enter your information to get started

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you an OTP to reset your password
forgotPassword.otpSentDescription: We've sent an OTP to {{email}}. Please check your inbox and enter the OTP to reset your password.

verifyOtp.title: Verify OTP
verifyOtp.description: Enter the 6-digit OTP sent to {{email}} and set your new password

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account security and connect your social media platforms to expand your reach
settings.updatePasswordDescription: Keep your account secure with a strong password
settings.socialAccountsDescription: Connect your platforms to expand reach
settings.connectDescription: Connect multiple channels to expand your reach. Make sure you are logged in before connecting.
settings.disconnectDescription: Are you sure you want to disconnect {{accountName}}? You will need to reconnect to publish content to {{platform}}.
settings.disconnectDescriptionTwitch: Are you sure you want to disconnect {{accountName}}? You will no longer be able to fetch live streams and generate reels from your Twitch streams. You will need to reconnect to access this feature.
settings.disconnectDescriptionInstagram: Are you sure you want to disconnect {{accountName}}? You will no longer be able to publish reels directly to Instagram. You will need to reconnect to publish content.

messages.passwordResetFailed: Invalid OTP or failed to reset password

messages.authorizationTimeout: Authorization timed out. Please try again.
messages.popupBlocked: Popup blocked. Please allow popups for this site.
messages.requestPasswordResetFirst: Please request a password reset first

validation.emailRequired: Please enter a valid email address
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.newPasswordDifferent: New password must be different from current password

projectReels.skippedReelDescription: This video was skipped as it didn't meet the criteria for engaging content to generate reels.
projectReels.reelsGeneratedDescription: Your reels have been generated successfully!

templateCategories.socialMediaDescription: Perfect for Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

upload.title: Upload Video
upload.subtitle: Upload your video file to get started with AI-powered editing
upload.dropVideoLinkFrom: For best results, upload a video longer than 3 minutes
upload.supportedPlatforms: YouTube, Google drive, Rumble, StreamYard, Twitch, Twitter, Loom, TikTok, LinkedIn, Facebook, Vimeo
upload.suggestionDetails: Upload a video longer than 3 minutes to get the most out of our AI-powered editing features. Longer videos provide more content for generating engaging clips and reels.
upload.onlyMp4Allowed: Only .mp4 video files are allowed. Please upload a .mp4 file.
upload.uploadCompleteDescription: Your video has been uploaded. Click 'Get Clips' to generate AI clips.
upload.uploadCompleteStatus: Upload complete. Click 'Get Clips' to generate AI clips.
upload.waitForUpload: Please wait for the upload to complete.
upload.clipsGenerationDescription: Reel generation will take some time. Your clips will appear on the dashboard once ready.
upload.finalizingUpload: Finalizing upload and generating AI clips...
upload.uploadError: Failed to upload video. Please try again.
upload.videoTooShortDescription: Video must be at least {{minDuration}} minutes long. Your video is only {{currentDuration}}.
upload.videoTooLongDescription: Video must be no longer than {{maxDuration}} minutes. Your video is {{currentDuration}}.
upload.videoTooLargeDescription: Video file size must be no larger than {{maxSize}}. Your file is {{currentSize}}.

index.welcomeDescription: Turn your long videos into viral clips with AI magic
